item.title: Case Involving Husband’s Friend and Fiancée
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving a husband’s friend and a fiancée, focusing on confirmed events and the investigation process.

media:content.media:title: Case Involving Husband’s Friend and Fiancée
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving a husband’s friend and a fiancée, focusing on confirmed events and the investigation process.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Mark Receives 48-Year Prison Sentence
item.description: A factual summary of the case and court decision, outlining the charges, legal process, and the sentence handed down.

media:content.media:title: Mark Receives 48-Year Prison Sentence
media:content.media:description: A factual summary of the case and court decision, outlining the charges, legal process, and the sentence handed down.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: A Tragedy That Might Have Been Prevented
item.description: A look at a recent incident with a focus on lessons learned and ways similar tragedies could be avoided in the future.

item.title: The Case of 2-Year-Old Caliyah Guyton

item.title: This is one of the most haunting cases!
item.description: This video explores a complex case, highlighting key facts, unanswered questions, and the details that continue to draw public attention.

item.title: Kouri Richins: Grieving Widow or Criminal Mastermind?!
item.description: A closer look at the case of Kouri Richins, examining key details, timelines, and questions surrounding the death that raised suspicions.
